power.vikingHero.headline: Official classification: **Viking Hero**. You lead with action and protect people like it’s a full-time job (with overtime).
strengths: Acts fast when stakes are real
Protective, loyal, and dependable under pressure
Creates momentum when everyone else freezes
pitfalls: Can rush in before the facts arrive
May carry more responsibility than is healthy
Sometimes treats ‘intense’ as a substitute for ‘certain’

power.wizardHero.headline: Official classification: **Wizard Hero**. You save people with foresight, strategy, and the rare superpower of not panicking.
strengths: Sees patterns early and plans ahead
Guides others with clarity and good sense
pitfalls: May accumulate ‘advisor fatigue’ from fixing everyone’s plans
Can seem distant while mentally running simulations

power.vikingGoblin.headline: Official classification: **Viking Goblin**. You tackle problems with bold instinct, questionable volume, and a suspiciously effective amount of chaos.
strengths: Brings energy that jump-starts stagnant rooms
Surprisingly effective in emergencies (even when the plan is vibes)
pitfalls: Can escalate conflicts by accident (or… on purpose)
power.vikingGoblin.oneLiner: If chaos is a ladder, you’re doing parkour on it.

power.wizardGoblin.headline: Official classification: **Wizard Goblin**. You win by outthinking the problem — and occasionally by moving the goalposts when no one’s looking.
strengths: Clever, inventive, and fast at finding hidden angles
Finds loopholes, shortcuts, and ‘totally legal’ workarounds
pitfalls: Can rationalize choices that were… ambitious
May treat people like chess pieces when focused

order.knightCommander.headline: Official classification: **Knight Commander**. You believe structure is how teams survive — and you’re willing to carry the clipboard into battle.
strengths: High integrity: you do what you said you’d do
pitfalls: May struggle with ambiguity or ‘vibes-based’ planning

order.pirateCaptain.headline: Official classification: **Pirate Captain**. You reject bad systems and build better ones — with a plan, a map, and a getaway route.
strengths: Independent leader who stays calm under uncertainty
Pragmatic reformer: fixes what’s broken, not what’s loud
pitfalls: May ignore helpful constraints out of principle
order.pirateCaptain.oneLiner: Rules are tools. You brought your own toolbox.

order.knightJester.headline: Official classification: **Knight Jester**. You respect the mission — but you refuse to let it become humorless.
strengths: Loyal teammate who keeps groups human
pitfalls: Can joke at the wrong moment
Sometimes uses humor to avoid seriousness

order.pirateJester.headline: Official classification: **Pirate Jester**. You dodge bureaucracy like it’s a slow-moving dragon and you’ve got a skateboard.
strengths: Disrupts stale systems in useful ways
Keeps things light while still moving forward
order.pirateJester.oneLiner: Chaos with a purpose… or at least a very strong vibe.

discipline.samuraiMaster.headline: Official classification: **Samurai Master**. You chase mastery through discipline: steady practice, sharp standards, real craft.
strengths: Highly consistent: you do the work even when it’s boring
pitfalls: Can be harsh on yourself (and occasionally others)

discipline.cowboySage.headline: Official classification: **Cowboy Sage**. You learn by living: experience is your teacher and freedom is your fuel.
pitfalls: Can resist structure even when it would help
May reinvent wheels out of independence
Sometimes avoids commitment to keep options open

discipline.samuraiTrickster.headline: Official classification: **Samurai Trickster**. You master the rules so you can bend them elegantly — like a ninja with a whiteboard.

discipline.cowboyTrickster.headline: Official classification: **Cowboy Trickster**. You’re the self-taught wildcard: intuitive, playful, and allergic to boring methods.
strengths: Inventive improviser who learns fast by doing
discipline.cowboyTrickster.oneLiner: You don’t follow paths. You make shortcuts.

social.royalDiplomat.headline: Official classification: **Royal Diplomat**. You lead with grace: polished presence, careful words, and high social accuracy.
strengths: Excellent at diplomacy and reading the room
Calms social tension without losing authority
social.royalDiplomat.oneLiner: A velvet glove with a firm handshake.

social.warriorQueen.headline: Official classification: **Warrior Queen**. You project competence like a force field: practical leadership with commanding calm.
strengths: Action-oriented leader who earns respect through capability
Keeps standards high without needing to shout
pitfalls: Can seem intimidating even when you’re being nice
May take on too much alone
social.warriorQueen.oneLiner: Kind, not soft. Strong, not loud.

social.roguePrincess.headline: Official classification: **Rogue Princess**. You win socially through charm and timing: polished, playful, and a little dangerous.
strengths: Magnetic charisma and strong social instincts
Knows when to sparkle and when to strike
pitfalls: Sometimes treats life like a game board

social.rogueAdventurer.headline: Official classification: **Rogue Adventurer**. You’re casual, bold, and unfiltered: you’d rather be real than refined.
strengths: Authentic, fearless, and practical under pressure
Brings honesty that cuts through nonsense
pitfalls: May seem inconsistent to more structured people
Sometimes rejects polish that would actually help

risk.gladiatorMonk.headline: Official classification: **Gladiator Monk**. You face risk with discipline: steady courage, controlled action, calm focus.
risk.gladiatorMonk.oneLiner: A battle plan and a breathing plan.

risk.philosopherMonk.headline: Official classification: **Philosopher Monk**. You manage uncertainty through reflection: careful thought, long horizons, minimal panic.
strengths: Excellent at seeing trade-offs and second-order effects
pitfalls: Sometimes misses the moment to act
risk.philosopherMonk.oneLiner: You don’t panic. You contemplate… intensely.

risk.gladiatorGambler.headline: Official classification: **Gladiator Gambler**. You bet on yourself, jump first, and figure out the landing midair.
strengths: Thrives in high stakes and fast timelines
pitfalls: May turn life into a permanent adrenaline sport

risk.philosopherGambler.headline: Official classification: **Philosopher Gambler**. You treat uncertainty like a laboratory: run experiments, collect data, repeat.
pitfalls: Sometimes breaks things that didn’t need breaking
